bug.description: race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization

prompt:
There is a race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization downstream of function nr_rrc_handle_msg3_indication in the openair2/RRC/NR_UE subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/RRC/NR_UE/rrc_UE.c:1947.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
